PluginData.Author: lolifamily
PluginData.Tooltip: MCP server for LLM-driven code execution inside Space Engineers 2
PluginData.Description:
*** WARNING — REMOTE CODE EXECUTION *** The bearer token = root password. Any client with it can run arbitrary C# on your machine (file I/O, processes, native [DllImport]). Never share or screenshot it; never port-forward the listener. Binds 127.0.0.1 only.
Turns your Space Engineers 2 game into an MCP (Model Context Protocol) server. An LLM like Claude can connect over HTTP and execute C# directly in the running game engine with full .NET and game API access, right down to internal types and members.
Features: - REPL-style: no boilerplate, Roslyn 5.3, [DllImport] supported - All assemblies referenced (.NET + game + plugins) incl. internal members - main + render execution lanes - Multi-frame coroutines + parallel script execution - Console.WriteLine() piped back to the LLM - Per-field errors with corrected line numbers - Configurable port, auto-generated bearer token
Transport: MCP Streamable HTTP (not SSE). POST JSON-RPC to http://localhost:6789/
